title: Mounted Medium Trilogy (1×11×14 + 2×8×10)
description: Create your own gallery wall. Includes (1) 11×14 and (2) 8×10 mounted prints printed on high‑quality Fujifilm photo paper and mounted on a lightweight 1" thick durable mounting board with black trimmed edges. Ready to hang. Customizable. Available same day.
notes: Walmart style 3-piece set; price before taxes/fees/profits.

title: Bayou Cypress Triptych Canvas Print
description:
Three majestic cypress trees rise from still, mirror-like water in this stunning 3-panel split canvas. Captured at golden light, the scene evokes the timeless beauty of the Southern bayou. Each panel is printed on premium gallery-wrapped canvas — together they form one breathtaking panoramic image for your wall.

Set includes 3 vertical canvas panels, each 20"h × 8"w. Sourced through Canvas Champ.
notes: 3-panel canvas triptych from Canvas Champ. Each panel 20"h × 8"w. Price TBD — update before going live.
